text:
ごめんなさい～！
今日はね、貸し切りなんです～！
ありがとうございます～！

I'm so sorry! We're reserved for an event
today!

I think my big sister's to the east. Just a
little sister's hunch.

I think my big sister's to the north. Just a
little sister's hunch.
